title: Job Opening Hotel Manager at Pugmarks India

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Hotel Manager at Pugmarks India
jsonLd.description:
We at Pugmarks India are looking for an experienced Hotel Manager based out of Thane. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Pugmarks India:
Pugmarks India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in F&B Service

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Pugmarks India!
